title: Inspect plan state and revision history
description: Return deterministic current state and immutable Draft, Active, and Superseded plan evidence for one period. Implements G1, G3, and G5 through UC-BUDGET-004.
rationale: The owner must reconstruct what was proposed and what governed a period without treating superseded intent as deleted.
story_want: inspect every plan revision and its lifecycle history
story_so_that: monthly intent and later changes remain attributable
acceptance_criteria: Given a period with revisions, when List Plan Revisions is requested, then all Draft, Active, and Superseded revisions are returned by creation timestamp ascending with stable revision identifier ascending as the tie-breaker.

Given an explicit revision identifier, when Get Plan Revision succeeds, then its exact entries, computed total, period, currency, status, actor, reason, creation timestamp, and activation or supersession provenance are returned.
Given a completed period, when plan state is requested, then Closed Budget Period is returned while all revision history remains readable.

Given a Spend Category was renamed, when an earlier revision is read, then its stable category identifier is unchanged and any current display name is supplemental rather than a rewrite of stored intent.
Given a Spend Category is archived, when an earlier revision is read, then its entry remains readable and is marked with the current inactive lifecycle state without becoming eligible for new use.
Given an unknown revision identifier, when Get Plan Revision is requested, then BUDGET returns a stable Not Found result and no plan state changes.
security_criteria: History reads return financial content only through the explicit structured data channel under the trusted owner identity.
